focus: Improve realized expectancy while maintaining active participation in normal liquidity.
risk_bias: Prefer REDUCE before BLOCK; reserve BLOCK for execution breakdown or severe regime mismatch.
extra_rules: Keep direction intent unless spread expansion and momentum disagreement persist for multiple checks.
When edge is medium, reduce size first and keep probing instead of fully blocking entries.
If win-rate degrades but spread/latency are healthy, tighten sizing and TP/SL balance before stopping entries.
Escalate to BLOCK only when reject rate, latency, or spread spikes indicate execution quality collapse.
Prioritize setups with stable spread and improving post-entry adverse excursion metrics.
